programme.title: Movie: The Game Plan
programme.desc: A quarterback's perfect bachelor lifestyle is put on hold when he discovers he has an 8-year-old daughter. The two form a bond over ballet and she eventually helps him clean up his image and discover his thoughtful and loving paternal instincts.

programme.title: Movie: Blair Witch
programme.desc: A group of college students go to the Black Hills Forest to search for James' sister, whose disappearance is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. As the night wears on, they discover the legend is real when they are attacked by a sinister presence.

programme.title: Movie: The Nun
programme.desc: A priest with a past that haunts him and a novitiate on the brink of her final vows travel to a remote Romanian abbey on orders from the Vatican to investigate a nun's death, risking their lives and their souls when they encounter an evil force.

programme.title: Movie: The Meg
programme.desc: After a research vessel is attacked, a prehistoric shark that was believed to be long-since extinct is found living in the ocean's deepest depths, and as it emerges to shallower waters a rescue diver who encountered it years prior must stop it.

programme.title: Movie: The Meg

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Deadly Hotel Check-In
programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished
programme.desc: Beautiful mom Michelle Parker appears on an episode of' The People’s Court', fighting with her ex-fiancé over a luxury, diamond engagement ring. But hours after that episode airs, Michelle mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Night of No Return
programme.desc: Lauren Spierer went for a night out with friends in June 2011. The college coed has never been seen since. But years later, the mystery deepens when another female student from the same university is found dead after another night on the town.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mystery in the Closet
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jessica and Matthew Boynton seemed like the picture-perfect couple until the young mother is found unresponsive and covered in blood inside her locked bedroom closet, and doesn't remember how she ended up there.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Sunstone
programme.desc: Josh heads to the U.K. and Norway to unlock the secrets of the Viking Sunstone, a mystic crystal the Vikings used to conquer the sea. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church and descends 1,000 feet into a deserted mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunting Vampires
programme.desc: Josh explores the history of vampirism in Romania and Bulgaria.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: Close Encounters
programme.desc: Josh begins his search for extraterrestrial life with an once-in-a-lifetime visit to NASA. He then hunts for evidence of aliens in Chile, where he views a UFO video captured by the military and assists scientists at the largest telescope on Earth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: Ancient Visitors
programme.desc: Josh's journey continues on remote Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe extraterrestrials visited millennia ago. He then visits the site of a recent meteorite strike in Zimbabwe that could prove life on Earth began in outer space.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: UFOs Over England
programme.desc: The hunt for alien life continues in Zimbabwe, where Josh interviews witnesses from one of the largest UFO sightings in modern history. Then, in England, he investigates the infamous case that has become known as 'Europe's Roswell.'

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for Extraterrestrials: Roswell Revealed
programme.desc: Josh's epic search for extraterrestrial life comes to a close in the USA, where a legendary investigation team brings him to a hot case in Arkansas. Then, he visits with a researcher who may have new information on the mother of all UFOs.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Out of Thin Air
programme.desc: The hunt for the Yeti continues as Josh's quest takes him from the frozen slopes of Mount Everest to the isolated forests of Bhutan, where Josh uses bait to force a more personal encounter with the creature.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Unmasking the Myth
programme.desc: Josh rafts into the remotest corners of Bhutan to capture some of his best evidence yet of the reclusive creature. Then he returns to the US where all of his samples are analyzed to find out if the Yeti is real.

programme.title: Expedition X: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Phil and Jessica head to Lake Lanier, the deadliest lake in America, to uncover rumors of drownings and ghostly encounters.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Samurai Sword of Power
programme.desc: Josh explores ancient shrines hidden in the mountains and underground tunnels across Japan in search for the missing mystical Honjo sword. Along the way, Josh learns the ways of the samurai and forges his own samurai sword.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Secret
programme.desc: Josh travels all over the US to find the treasures featured in 'The Secret,' a cryptic book published in the 1980s. He meets with members of the book's cult following, who each think they're on the verge of finding one of the 10 remaining treasures.

programme.title: The Loch Ness Monster Revealed
programme.desc: Philippe Cousteau investigates Loch Ness to find out whether the legendary beast exists.

programme.title: Man-Eating Python
programme.desc: Akbar Salubiro went missing on the island of Sulawesi; a search party captured their discovery on video as they sliced open the belly of a massive python only to find Akbar had been swallowed whole.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Seasons on the Fly Lodge 2019
programme.desc: We go to the Seasons on the Fly Lodge on Alaska's Kvichak River.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today
programme.desc: A look at the visionaries bringing inspiration, creation and growth to tomorrow's world.

programme.title: The Elite Fishing League: Winning Ways Feature from Round 2
programme.desc: A look back at the season's Round 2.

programme.title: The Anglerschannel Bass Wrap Up Show: ACBWS-2 October
programme.desc: Carl Jocumsen teaches us about glide baits, and we go to North Carolina's Lake Gaston for the bass Bash with Collin's Marine.

programme.title: Ocean Legacy: Best of Ocean Legacy
programme.desc: A look at season one's highlights.

programme.title: Out Da Bayou: The Man, The Myth, The Legend
programme.desc: A look at the last trip ODB taped with Captain Theophile Bourgeois.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Paydirt Playbook
programme.desc: The miners reveal the secrets behind what it takes to strike it rich gold mining.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Promised Land
programme.desc: Parker expands to a second cut and puts his trust in a rookie foreman. Tony battles the cursed cut. Rick fires up his plant on rich ground. Greenhorn Fred Lewis calls in a mining legend. The miners reveal their secrets for striking it rich gold mining.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: White Mountain
programme.desc: With help from a team of friends, an avid outdoorsman takes on the challenge of building a cabin in the remote White Mountains region of Alaska. The crew must work through snow, wind and mud to haul materials and build the cabin in just seven days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Glacier River Cabin
programme.desc: A young couple leave the Air Force to build a cabin and start a new life in Alaska. With only three weeks to make it ready before winter, they call in family and friends to help. Follow their journey as they endure the elements and handcraft their home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Passive River House
programme.desc: A pro builder constructs an off-grid dream home for his family on a remote riverside plot of land in the heart of Canada's east coast. He faces tropical storms, winter blizzards and more all while using innovative methods to meet passive house standards.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Sleepless in Steatocystoma
programme.desc: Jen has substantial growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain, and vertigo. Juliet is under emotional distress because of the bumps all over her neck and chest. Gerald has a mysterious, kiwi-size lump on his middle finger.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma
programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a horned growth that has her deeply concerned. Fred has a mysterious condition on his hands and has not been able to get answers from any doctors. Kevin has a huge lump protruding from his hip.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Tumor Takeover
programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body. Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck. Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen. Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Last Unicorn
programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator. Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head. Johnny's been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Lee Nose Best!
programme.desc: Tony has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Kevin has a bump in his jawline that is a 'lady deterrent.' Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead that makes her a hermit. Tommy's leg bump makes it difficult for him to work.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This Cyst Persists
programme.desc: Half of Mary's body is a size 18, while the other half is a size 8. Anthony's cyst is in the area called the Triangle of Death. Shane wants to get a lump off his back. Brandi's anxiety could prevent her from getting a lump removed from her chest.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dressed to Thrill
programme.desc: From dresses fit for royalty to dresses that are barely there, our brides took their shopping to a whole new level this season. Randy recalls the looks that killed and the dresses that thrilled.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Say Yes to the Dress at Home
programme.desc: The COVID-19 pandemic has turned the bridal industry upside down, forcing Kleinfeld to temporarily shut its doors. During the shutdown, brides continue to email Randy and the Kleinfeld family, and these are some of their stories.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Watteau Is the Word of the Day
programme.desc: Jennifer wants to break out of her taekwondo uniform, but her mom won't let it go. Madison is forced to choose sides when her two moms' opinions collide. Rebecca rides a mechanical shark all the way to the altar.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Hollywood Meets Bollywood
programme.desc: Stephanie tries to please her squabbling parents, and a former pageant queen wants a dress with a Hollywood-meets-Bollywood vibe.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is a Randy Situation
programme.desc: An indecisive bride has a challenge for Randy, plus, The Hip Hop Medium wants a black dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Whose Side Are You On?
programme.desc: Michaella is getting married in an Irish castle, and she wants a princess dress for less than a king's ransom. Also, fashionista Shavonne has a high-style reputation to maintain.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: She Popped the Thigh at Me
programme.desc: Bride Samantha has mastered her weight-loss goals, but can she get her mom to like her wedding dress? Shock jock Ashlee wants a ball gown that will make her mother blush. Plus, a bride has a glam wedding in Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Big Brother Hits Kleinfeld
programme.desc: A bride and groom from 'Big Brother' shop together, social media pro Kristin must look perfect, and Chef Cat Cora gets married.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: My Best Girls
programme.desc: One mother helps her son buy lingerie to spice up his sex life, while another crashes her son's Valentine's Day date.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Ready or Not
programme.desc: Sumit pleads with his parents to accept Jenny. Brittany arrives in Chicago hoping to finalize her divorce. Melyza reveals her secret. Armando is reluctant to tell his family about his engagement. Ari and Bini are shaken by unexpected news.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: The Consequences of Truth
programme.desc: Ari struggles with the news about her pregnancy. Deavan and Jihoon make a big move. Yazan starts to question his relationship with Brittany. Melyza reveals her secret to Tim. Armando's family reacts to his engagement to Kenny.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: With her high school graduation coming up, a teenage girl must choose between her vampire boyfriend and her werewolf friend.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: Edward and Bella's unborn child is a risk to the citizens of Forks and to the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: The Volturi are in uproar upon learning of the birth of Edward and Bella's child, Renesmee. In order to protect the innocent child from destruction, the Cullens and the wolves come together in battle.

programme.title: Movie: Twilight
programme.desc: A teen yearning for belonging and understanding moves in with her father in Washington State. She soon falls in love with an enigmatic boy at school, who turns out to be a vampire. They find themselves drawn to each other despite their differences.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After realizing that Bella would be safer with them out of the picture, the Cullen's leave town. Heartbroken, Bella turns to Jacob for comfort and friendship, but quickly learns that Jacob is keeping a secret of his own.

programme.desc: 'Sleepy Hollow's' Lyndie Greenwood joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to check out some terrifying 'everyday demons,' and laugh at some hilarious hockey 'puck ups.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXVII
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo talk about the pitfalls of giving ‘111 percent’, the discomfort that is ‘weird love’, and feeling like you're at ‘the wrong party’.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Teyana Taylor
programme.desc: On this episode, Teyana Taylor joins the show.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: America's Sweetheart

programme.title: Undercover Boss: Oriental Trading Company

programme.title: Shark Tank

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Mission: Relative Chaos

programme.title: The Loud House: Band Together/ Blinded by Science

programme.title: The Loud House: Good Sports/ Geri-Antics

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Evil Orthodontist
programme.desc: Rachel may be falling for her ex-fiancé Barry, an orthodontist; Chandler has girl trouble.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Fake Monica
programme.desc: Monica's credit card is stolen, and along with Phoebe and Rachel, she decides to catch the person who stole it. The thief turns out to be so charming and inspiring that Monica decides to become friends with her instead of turning her over to the police.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Inspired By Italy
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes an Italian-inspired brunch for his Naples-born friend, Cooking Channel's Laura Vitale. He puts his spin on everyone's favorite Italian dish with Breakfast Pizza, adds freshness with Dandelion Green Salad.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Good Ingredients
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares recipes that use her favourite good ingredients starting with good chocolate in her chocolate pecan meringue torte. Next, good maple syrup and lemon are turned into sublime side dishes including maple-roasted acorn squash.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: A Picture Worth Eating
programme.desc: Valerie invites photographer Brian Bowen Smith over for a menu inspired by his favorite ingredient, tequila. Tequila lime chicken wings, chayote slaw, chile lime party mix, a mango tart and mango tequila sunrise are served.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Stand-In Daughter
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes dinner in miniature for a fun get-together with her niece. She prepares all of niece Halle's favorites, like adorable Bacon Cheeseburger Bites with little Loaded Crash Hots and charming Waldorf Salad Skewers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Care Package 101
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares the fundamentals of creating care packages while putting one together for Alex. Lemon raspberry pound cake, snickerdoodles, brown butter granola clusters, strawberry fruit roll-ups and custom-made hot chocolate mix gets wrapped up.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Nothing But The Best
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has a line-up of the best bits of food with a stuffed pizza crust and arrabiata sauce, orange blueberry muffin tops, 'a little fruit with my crisp' and crispy chicken skins for a CLT salad with simple ranch dressing.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sunday at Chuck and Nan's
programme.desc: The whole family gathers in town for Sunday lunch at Ree's in-law's. Ladd's dad grills chicken a la Chuck while everyone is at church and Ree brings deviled bacon and eggs, pork lover's baked beans and country-style peach slab pie to feed a crowd.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Dinner Staycation
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a Mexican food vacation for her husband, Nick, with all his favorites. She cooks up a decadent refried beans and rice bowl, roasted salmon tacos wrapped in chewy homemade flour tortillas.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Southern at Heart
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is revisiting her most-comforting and crowd-pleasing Southern recipes, including Country Ham Biscuits and Scallion-Pimento Cheese, Pete's Catfish, Fried Green Tomatoes and her family's special recipe for Eboo's Wild Scuppernong Pie.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Best of Barefoot Comfort: Easy Dinners
programme.desc: Ina Garten is serving up her top picks for comforting, easy dinners, plus a new aperitif. There's Rigatoni with Sausage and Fennel, Roast Chicken Cobb Salad, Spring Green Risotto and a refreshing California Ice Tea.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Italian
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing all her secrets and pro tips for Italian dishes. She starts with a fabulous two-fer, tomato eggplant soup, and the leftovers become baked pasta with tomatoes and eggplant.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: From Chaos to Calm

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Keep the Charm, Not the Layout

programme.title: Movie: Sinister Stalker

programme.title: Movie: A Killer in My Home
programme.desc: A woman's world falls apart when her husband dies unexpectedly just after sharing the news that he has a secret family with her. Months later, his teenage son, and his mother, arrive on her doorstep determined to stay.

programme.title: Movie: No Good Deed
programme.desc: A dangerous escaped convict poses as a man having car trouble in order to invade the home of a former District Attorney, who is there alone with her two small children.

programme.title: Movie: Kidnap
programme.desc: A single mother takes her son to an amusement park where he gets abducted. She goes to the police, but realizes that she doesn't have the time to wait for their help. Taking her son's safety into her own hands, she pursues the abductor relentlessly.

programme.title: Below Deck: All That Glitters Isn't Gold
programme.desc: The Crew's wild evening out prompts a passionate, late-night tryst for Rhylee and Tyler, but there's trouble in paradise for Ashton and Laura. As the Team's eighth Charter begins, childhood insecurities resurface for Josiah.

programme.title: Below Deck: Exodus
programme.desc: The crew including Captain Lee are shocked to wake up and hear the shocking news that Kate quit. In Kate's absence, Simone and Courtney struggle to maintain order in the interior. Ashton doesn't remember his actions from the night before.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek

programme.title: Movie: Shrek

programme.title: Movie: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: A young boy forms a special bond with a stranded alien and tries to help him return home.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry: Luann de Lesseps, Maddie Ziegler, Jax Taylor, Tom Sandoval and Tituss Burgess

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry: Lala Kent, Jesse Tyler Ferguson, Holly Robinson Peete
programme.desc: Lala Kent finds herself brought to tears when Tyler connects with her father. Then, Jesse Tyler Ferguson brings forth a long-hidden family secret.

programme.title: Hollywood Medium With Tyler Henry: Jill Zarin, Carson Kressley, Mike 'The Situation' Sorrentino
programme.desc: Tyler heads to New York City for a wild reading with former 'Real Housewife of New York' Jill Zarin, whose family is shocked by the amazingly specific messages from her beloved departed husband Bobby.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Watch with Ashley and Kathryn: Ho, Ho, Ho
programme.desc: After five years of constant tension, Patricia finally extends an olive branch and invites Kathryn to her winter ball. As these two enemies make peace, the delicate truce between Craig and Naomie blows up when he brings a date to the ball.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Watch with Madison and Patricia: White Gloves Off
programme.desc: The Charleston socialites get ready for another grand event hosted by Miss Patricia, and battle lines are drawn when Austen learns that Shep and Craig's dates are the girls from his infamous threesome video.

programme.title: Below Deck: B*tch in Charge
programme.desc: Captain Lee worries that Chandler is mismanaging his deck team after hearing some unsettling news. Ross confronts Rhylee after she oversteps her boundaries. Meanwhile, Caroline feels left out vents her frustrations to Kate.

programme.title: Below Deck: Naked Smoothies
programme.desc: Rhylee and Chandler continue to be at odds. The crew welcome a group of social media obsessed Silicon Valley investors. Caroline wakes up with a mysterious foot injury and has difficulty pulling her weight, and Kate struggles with the guests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Get Better or Go Home
programme.desc: As Chandler’s decision making frustrates the deck crew, Rhylee and Ashton grow desperate for a change at bosun. The charter guests overcome their fears by swimming with some scary ocean predators.

programme.title: Below Deck: New Kids on the Dock
programme.desc: The crew welcomes aboard their largest group of charter guests yet, including two young children, posing new challenges for everyone. While Chef Adrian jumps through hoops to please all their preferences, Chandler tries to redeem himself.

programme.title: Below Deck: Flesh Wounds are not Five Star
programme.desc: Chandler is left at odds with Captain Lee and the entire Deck Team when an oversight leaves the charter guests stranded at an off-boat excursion without basic amenities.

programme.title: Below Deck: Insult to Injury
programme.desc: Captain Lee comes to a decision about restructuring the deck team, while Caroline is pushed to make a decision regarding her place. Ashton proves to be a ladies' man on a night out, while Rhylee ruffles some feathers with Adrian.

programme.title: Below Deck: Man Overboard
programme.desc: My Seanna struggles to pull off a successful Charter on the heels of two dramatic exits from crew members, Chandler and Caroline. Tensions rise as newly-appointed bosun, Ross, finds himself at odds with an easily-riled Rhylee.

programme.title: Below Deck: Let Them Eat Chicken!
programme.desc: The aftermath of Ashton's accident has the entire crew shaken up, especially Captain Lee. While the deck crew is on edge with a man down, Laura struggles to fall in line with her third stew role and her boss Kate.

programme.title: Below Deck: Check Yourself!
programme.desc: Adrian is confused by Laura's flirtatious advances after she crashes with Ashton in the crow's nest. Meanwhile, Rhylee gets fired up when Ross tells Tyler he'd be doing him a favour by hooking up with her. Laura and Kate have a screaming match.

programme.title: Below Deck: 'I Said I Got It!'
programme.desc: Kate deals with Laura's insubordination after being told to 'check' herself. Ross is at his wits end with Rhylee's attitude after she confronts him once again about feeling like the low man on the totem pole.

programme.title: Movie: Get Out
programme.desc: A young black man is invited to his white girlfriend's family estate. When he arrives, he notices that the staff of the house are all black, and something seems off. When one warns him to get out, he finds himself trapped by the dangerous family.

programme.title: Movie: Venom
programme.desc: While investigating a secret lab where the Life Foundation is performing sinister experiments on people, a reporter is exposed to an alien symbiote that bonds with him, granting him super-human abilities but also a lust for murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Movie: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: A family of four living in an isolated farmhouse must remain absolutely silent because of the deadly monsters that hunt using sound that live all around them, but with a new baby on the way that perpetual and safe silence may soon be shattered.

programme.title: Movie: The First Purge
programme.desc: In an attempt to reduce the crime rate, the American government makes all crimes legal for 12 hours in a small city to let people purge their more violent urges, but when the oppressed people become targets they fight back and the violence spreads.

programme.title: Jessie: The Runaway Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: As the Ross kids prepare for the Halloween festival, the festivities take a scary turn when Brooks proposes to Jessie and she learns that none of the kids like him.

programme.title: Wicked Woods: A Descendants Halloween Story
programme.desc: The Descendant dolls have a surprise encounter with the infamous Headless Horseman.

programme.title: Disney Channel Halloween House Party
programme.desc: Disney Channel fan-favourite stars take on a variety of zany characters and spooktacular spoofs in this sketch comedy show. Filmed remotely and hosted by Tobie Windham ('Just Roll With It'), the cast transforms themselves and their homes.

programme.title: Disney Channel Special: Disney Hall of Villains
Bunk'd: In Your Wildest Screams
programme.desc: Gwen warns everyone that her dream effigy doll, Cuddles, can cause nightmares. The others laugh, but it doesn't take long to realize Cuddles' true power.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Camp Kiki-slasher
programme.desc: An investigation begins when the campers start to mysteriously disappear one by one.

programme.title: Jessie: The Ghostess With the Mostest
programme.desc: Jessie makes the Ross kids bring Stuart along for trick-or-treating and he tells them a haunting story about a ghost who is out to get them. One by one, the kids mysteriously disappear. Then, Jessie attends a masquerade party and meets a mysterious boy.

programme.title: Disney Fam Jam: Trick or Treat Yo Self
programme.desc: This dance battle gets spooky when the Gandia and Devers families take to the 'Disney Fam Jam' stage to compete for the ultimate treat: the $10,000 prize and 'Disney Fam Jam' trophy.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Aliens Among Us
programme.desc: After watching a documentary series about aliens, Blair becomes convinced that the family's new neighbors are from a different planet and enlists Owen's help to find evidence to prove it.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Shut-In!
programme.desc: In this special extended episode, Anne and the Plantars protect themselves from the dangers of the annual Blue Moon by locking themselves in the house and entertaining each other with the scariest stories they can think of.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: The Scariest Story Ever: A Mickey Mouse Halloween Spooktacular
programme.desc: Mickey is challenged by his nephews to tell a scary story on Halloween night.

programme.title: Jessie: The Blind Date, the Cheapskate and the Primate
programme.desc: To prove that she's over Tony, Jessie decides that she and Tony will set each other up with other people.

programme.title: Jessie: Ghost Bummers

programme.title: Bunk'd: A Tale of Two Stackers

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Story So-fa

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Tiny House-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Sing It Live-A-Rooney
programme.desc: As the cast of 'Sing it Live!!!' gets ready for a live televised show, a vocal injury threatens to ruin Liv's performance.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Future Sounds and Festival Songs
programme.desc: When Austin and Ally are transported to a fantastical future, they realize that advanced technology can feel less personal when it comes to song writing, and learn to appreciate the traditional process.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Breaking Barb

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Gamer 2.0
programme.desc: Max gets akumatized by Hawk Moth again. Now Gamer 2.0, he captures all the former akumatized villains and challenges Ladybug and Cat Noir to free them by playing against him. Let the game begin again.

programme.title: Jessie: To Be Me or Not to Be Me
programme.desc: Jessie gets her first big acting part in a Shakespeare production in the park. When Jessie and Zuri switch personalities, that leaves an eight-year-old trying to pull off Jessie's performance and keep from ruining it for her.

programme.title: Jessie: Toy Con
programme.desc: Zuri must find a way to get back a cherished toy that Jessie passed on to her after she trades it to a toy collector. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma work together to teach Bertram Salsa dancing so he can compete in a dance contest to win his crush's heart.

programme.title: Jessie: Punch Dumped Love
programme.desc: Jessie grounds Emma from going to the school dance. Emma must sneak out to warn Luke his crush is dumping him. Adam Sandler, guest starring as himself, offers Luke some relationship advice at the dance.

programme.desc: Jessie and Tony’s first anniversary is coming up, and Jessie’s gift to Tony is writing a song about how much he means to her, but she can’t find the right words to express how much he means to her.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friday Night Tights

programme.desc: It was just before Halloween. Joel Lovelien and his fiancé headed to a local bar packed with people in costume. Then, Joel stepped outside and walked into a troubling mystery. Police rounded up potential suspects, but could they unmask a killer?

programme.desc: When Cathy Torrez never came home after work, her family feared the worst. An intensive search ended after her car was found, with her body in the trunk. It take years to get to the truth.

programme.title: License to Kill: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: In the midst of the emerging opioid epidemic, investigators in Los Angeles look into a cluster of mysterious overdose deaths of young men in their 20's and discover a Doctor who uses her prescription pad to line her pockets and kill her patients.

programme.title: License to Kill: Deadly Pharmacist
programme.desc: Deception and greed drive a local pharmacist in Kansas City down an evil path, affecting the lives of thousands of helpless and trusting cancer patients who believe they're getting life-saving treatment.

programme.title: License to Kill: Death by Miracle Cure
programme.desc: Detectives in Colorado investigate a Naturopathic Doctor after two of his patients develop horrific side effects from dubious miracle treatments. What they uncover is a deadly history of fraud and barbaric, invasive medical treatments.

programme.title: License to Kill: A Match Made in Hell
programme.desc: In order to solidify the secret bond keeping them together, two aids working at a nursing home create a twisted murderous game involving the Alzheimer's patients they care for.

programme.title: Dateline: 11 Minutes
programme.desc: Alabama teenager Madison Holton speaks out about the fight to prove his innocence after being charged with the murder of his parents.

programme.title: Dateline: The Halloween Party
programme.desc: After a young woman goes missing from a Halloween party, a town turns out to search while detectives settle in for a long investigation.

programme.title: Dateline: The Halloween Party
programme.desc: After a young woman goes missing from a Halloween party, a town turns out to search while detectives settle in for a long investigation.

programme.title: Dateline: She Didn't Come Home
programme.desc: A mother in Pennsylvania disappears one afternoon after she is last seen by her co-workers leaving for lunch. The case remains cold even after 60 investigators try to crack it.

programme.title: Dateline: Facing the Music
programme.desc: When a young school teacher in Pennsylvania is murdered, her friends wonder if the killer will be caught. Following years without an arrest, investigators discover a new tool that may finally help unlock the murderer’s identity.

programme.title: Snapped: Kalila Taylor
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a homecoming queen shocks a NY town.

programme.title: Snapped: Lisa Gilliam
programme.desc: A wife is charged with killing her husband, an attorney with financial woes, but was it a suicide, and was she wrongly accused.

programme.title: Snapped: Caren Pressley-Brown
programme.desc: A respected business owner snaps, turning a bitter custody fight into a plot for murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Exondia Salado
programme.desc: An army reservist disappears, and his temperamental wife appears to have cooked the evidence.

programme.title: Snapped: Nancy Gelber

programme.title: Snapped: Kathleen Wise

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Knotek

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVI
programme.desc: Mr. Burns invites Homer and his friends to his big estate for a hunting tournament, but Homer and the gang learn they are the ones being hunted. The Simpsons adopt David, an artificial robot son, after Bart falls into a coma.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII
programme.desc: A meteor falls to Earth and reveals a green goo that Homer mistakes for marshmallow. Bart brings Golem to life and forces him to carry out his bidding. A radio broadcast convinces the people of Springfield that they're in the midst of an alien invasion.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVIII
programme.desc: The fright fest begins in 'Mr. and Mrs. Simpson' as Homer and Marge leave for what appears to be an ordinary day. But Homer is living a double life as a secret agent, and he is assigned to eliminate Kent Brockman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIX
programme.desc: Homer kills off celebrities so their likenesses can be exploited free-of-charge. Transformer-like robots duke it out in Springfield. Lisa accompanies Milhouse to a pumpkin patch to await the appearance of the Grand Pumpkin, who finally appears.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXI
programme.desc: Marge, worried about the effects of excessively violent video games, encourages Bart and Milhouse to give wholesome, classic board games a shot. Then, Lisa likes a boy who happens to be a vampire.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXII
programme.desc: Homer takes a dangerous dive into an isolated canyon on Candy Peak, but when a crashing boulder traps his arm, he channels the spirit of Aron Ralston to save himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIII
programme.desc: A Mayan Homer and Marge are witnesses to the prediction that 2012 will be the end of the world, the Springfield Subatomic Supercollider creates a black hole that terrorizes the city and Bart travels back in time to 1974.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIV
programme.desc: Homer rides around Springfield wreaking havoc as 'The Fat in The Hat' in a rhyming Dr. Seuss-ian tale. In 'Dead and Shoulders,' Bart is beheaded during a kite accident and his head is attached to Lisa's body.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXV
programme.desc: On the annual spooktacular Halloween special, Bart and Lisa are transported to a demon-filled alternate universe after Bart reads a set of Aramaic symbols he finds on the underside of his desk.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVI
programme.desc: In the annual frightfest Halloween episode, Sideshow Bob finally kills Bart, only to reanimate him. Homer wakes up with short-term memory loss, and Lisa, Bart and Milhouse get super powers from radiation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVII
programme.desc: Mr. Burns introduces a 'Hunger Games'-style contest in which Springfield's children must fight each other, and Lisa's imaginary best friend becomes jealous of Lisa's real best friends.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVIII
programme.desc: Maggie becomes possessed by an ancient demon, Lisa discovers a creepy yet perfect version of her family in an alternate universe and Homer cannibalizes himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIX
programme.desc: Homer wins an oyster-eating contest against the mythical Cthulhu, Springfield is overrun by plant body-snatchers, Lisa finally snaps and Mr. Burns opens a retirement home with some Jurassic upgrades.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thanksgiving of Horror
programme.desc: The Simpsons are forced to face various Thanksgiving nightmares, including the first Thanksgiving, an A.I. mishap and a dangerous space mission complicated by a sentient cranberry sauce.

programme.title: Archer: Cold Fusion
programme.desc: Archer and the gang travel to Antarctica to solve a murder mystery with international implications.

programme.title: Cake: Sorry, Not Sorry

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Reignites the Rivalry
programme.desc: After serving a ten-year ban, the Paddy's team is once again eligible to compete in Flipadelphia, a city-wide flip cup tournament. Now all they have to do is instigate their old rivals, who have since grown up.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac Fights Gay Marriage
programme.desc: Mac pulls out the big guns to protect the sanctity of marriage, while the rest of the gang reap the rewards of marital bliss.

programme.title: You're the Worst: A Very Good Boy
programme.desc: Jimmy attempts to prove that, despite being on the verge of becoming a married man, he has not lost his edge. Edgar and Lindsay attempt to go on a real date.

programme.title: Movie: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Raised from a calf by a young girl, Ferdinand is a massive bull whose physical size is rivalled only by the size of his heart. When the bovine is mistakenly thought to be an aggressive beast, he's captured and forced to fight against his will.

programme.title: Movie: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Raised from a calf by a young girl, Ferdinand is a massive bull whose physical size is rivalled only by the size of his heart. When the bovine is mistakenly thought to be an aggressive beast, he's captured and forced to fight against his will.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Colonel Homer
programme.desc: Colonel Homer discovers a singer named Lurleen Lumpkin at a bar and becomes her manager.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last Temptation of Homer
programme.desc: Mr. Burns is forced to hire a woman after violating labour laws. Homer soon begins to daydream about Mindy, the new employee, and he finds himself in a difficult situation when they go on a business trip together. Meanwhile, Bart gets branded as a nerd.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Viva Ned Flanders
programme.desc: Feeling as though life is passing him by, Ned takes a gambling vacation in Sin City.

programme.title: The Simpsons: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad Marge
programme.desc: A young woman temporarily moves in with the Simpsons when she is jilted at the altar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: The Simpson family is ordered to see a social worker after a monopoly game goes sour.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer of Seville
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires Homer to sing the lead in his production of 'La Bohème.' Homer wows the crowd and escapes a mob of crazed fans with the help of a mysterious woman who seems a little too concerned with Homer's well being.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangerous Curves
programme.desc: When the Simpson family takes a road trip to a cabin in the woods, a series of flashbacks depict Homer and Marge's blissful courtship and their early, married years.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Labor Pains
programme.desc: Homer remembers his Lamaze skills when he's forced to deliver a baby in an elevator. When the mother names the child Homer Jr., he quickly develops a deep emotional bond with the kid. Lisa is recruited by the cheerleaders of the local pro football team.

programme.title: Life: Hunters and Hunted
programme.desc: Explore the world of the carnivores, from cats and dogs to bears and dolphins that must make a kill in order to survive. To win, they must overcome the weapons, intelligence and speed of their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: The Hunt: Living With Predators: Conservation
programme.desc: Visit the frontline of the conflict with the world's top predators and meet the scientists fighting to save them. Crossing five continents and combining natural history footage with human drama, this episode checks the pulse of the earth's iconic animals.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Making of The Hunt

programme.title: Weird Wonders of the World

programme.title: Weird Wonders of the World

programme.title: Weird Wonders of the World
programme.desc: Chris discovers the secrets behind a flame-filled firenado, unearths a very bizarre looking living rock and meets a team of oversized rats who save lives.

programme.title: Weird Wonders of the World

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities

programme.desc: Hank raises the stakes of family game night to a new high, and each member of the family will do whatever it takes to win the grand prize.

programme.title: Movie: Bunks
programme.desc: Troublemaking brothers accidentally unleash a curse on their camp that brings every campfire story to life.

programme.title: Scared Shrekless
programme.desc: When Halloween arrives, Shrek cannot wait to start celebrating his favourite holiday. Instead of the usual tricks and treats, Shrek challenges the fairy-tale characters to a storytelling contest in the haunted castle.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens: Mutant Pumpkins From Outer Space
programme.desc: The Monsters are working as special ops and are dispatched to Modesto, Calif. An alien presence is detected, but when the team arrives, everything appears normal. When Halloween arrives, the jack-o-lanterns turn into aliens and try to take over the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Druselsteinoween
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Night Witch You'll Always Remember
programme.desc: When Bailey discovers that Clumsy Carl is going to ask her to an upcoming dance, she desperately searches for a different date and lands on Herman.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Teachers Break Their Promises
programme.desc: When the students learn their much-anticipated class trip has been cancelled due to budgetary reasons, they devise a plan to fight back. Meanwhile, Uncle Will, Dusty, Chance, and Herman turn the mall upside down to prank a security guard.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Crushed
programme.desc: Chance flirts with a girl via text message, but after she flakes on him, he starts to believe that Bailey is pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Allowance Drama
programme.desc: Hilarity continues when Uncle Will and the kids bring a Loch Ness Pool Monster to life and stage a fake game show 'Date My Mom!' to prank a contestant with a series of gross and wild challenges.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Big Mother is Watching
programme.desc: The kids are outraged to learn that a tracking app has been installed on all of their phones.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dino Safari VR
programme.desc: Chance, Herman and Dusty are mesmerized by a new dinosaur virtual reality game which inspires a new set of pranks. Bailey disguises as a mind-melting robot from the future. An unsuspecting camp counselor believe he's discovered a spaceship in the woods.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Hall-O-Scream!
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Halloween Spooktacular
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Koala Inception
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Lord of the Jump Kings
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Stuck
programme.desc: When Herman tries to do a prank on his own, he ends up trapped inside the school's trophy case. Now it's up to the rest of the gang to get him out without getting caught.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Baby Please
programme.desc: Bailey catches Herman reading her diary and decides to get payback by pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Penultimate
programme.desc: Chance is worried after his phone pocket-likes a controversial post.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dear Me
programme.desc: The kids have to write letters to themselves 20 years in the future. Meanwhile, the gang pulls off hilarious pranks that include a wild skunk scaring a babysitter, and a target who believes a 3-D printer can print real food.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: School Clubbing
programme.desc: The gang signs up for after school clubs. Bailey joins the 'friends of animals club,' Dusty the 'TV club,' Herman the 'wrestling club' and Chance the 'journalism club.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Wedding
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Very Vlad Joke
programme.desc: The team tries to teach Bailey's new friend Vlad the art of pulling off a great practical joke, just in time for them to pull off an epic prank involving a teacher's aide, aliens and the military.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Earth Gets Mooned
programme.desc: The gang takes part in an annual science competition at school, but they have trouble with their project partners.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: No Debating Bailey
programme.desc: When Drama Drew transfers schools, Ms. Spencer hunts for a replacement debater to face off against him at upcoming the regional championships.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Fallout Shelter
programme.desc: After Dusty embarrasses everyone, Chance considers joining a rival prank show.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Lord of the Gummmy Worms
programme.desc: When the kids are stranded alone in the woods on a school camping trip, Bailey and Chance split into rival groups over their only supply of food: Gummy Worms.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Night Witch You'll Always Remember
programme.desc: When Bailey discovers that Clumsy Carl is going to ask her to an upcoming dance, she desperately searches for a different date and lands on Herman.

programme.title: Oddbods: Party Monsters

programme.title: Oddbods: Oddbeard's Curse
programme.desc: Characters with different personalities get together for adventures.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Cobra and Mongoose / Better Off Fred

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner
programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.desc: Bernadette and Wolowitz leave their kids for the first time; Penny and Leonard try to keep a secret; Sheldon and Amy stick together; and Raj makes a new friend, as the gang travels together into an uncharted future.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Movie: The Wedding Ringer
programme.desc: A socially awkward groom-to-be employs a best-man-for-hire to put together a wedding impressive enough to satisfy his in-laws. As the big day approaches and plans are well underway, the two guys find an unlikely bromance forming.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Two womanizers sneak into weddings in order to take advantage of the romantic tinge in the air.

programme.title: Movie: Due Date
programme.desc: After being kicked off an airplane, a man must rent a car and drive cross-country with the person who got him on the no-fly list, in order to make it to his child's birth on time.

programme.title: Family Matters: Scammed
programme.desc: Eddie and Waldo go to a famous basketball bar but are shocked at their expensive bill.

programme.title: Family Matters: A Ham Is Born
programme.desc: Carl takes an job as a security guard for a movie set and is told to kiss his co-star.

programme.title: George Lopez: Max's Big Adventure

programme.desc: George learns the meaning of company loyalty when he's offered a job by a competitor.

programme.title: George Lopez: Show Dyslexic The

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Hugs Rachel

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross' Denial
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler cancel their plans to live together, due to their bickering over their tastes.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Porsche

programme.title: American Dad!: Daesong Heavy Industries II: Return to Innocence

programme.desc: When Roger breaks his ankle, Francine convinces Stan to let him play in his basketball league. Meanwhile, Steve sings a song that parodies R. Kelley's 'Trapped in the Closet.'

programme.desc: Molly and Tooey must track down one of Connie's prized turkeys. And, Molly, Tooey and Trini decide to build a sailboat and voyage to distant waters.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Gone
programme.desc: When a Montreal high school student vanishes while visiting New York City, three arrogant prep school teens become suspects. However, one of the suspects disappears and the judge has no choice but to dismiss the case due to lack of evidence.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Haystack

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Responsible
programme.desc: When an honour student dies at a party, the four teens who hosted the party are charged with criminally negligent homicide. Judge Donnelly gives them a slap on the wrists, and Det. Stabler enlists the help of his teenage daughter to crack the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Cold
programme.desc: The tables are turned when detective Chester Lake reopens a closed murder case and becomes the prime suspect, causing chaos within the squad.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Persona

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Confidential
programme.desc: After security footage captures a woman being abducted, she is found murdered and dumped in a basement. Detective Munch recalls a similarity between this case and one from 20-years prior.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Behave
programme.desc: A rape victim is brought to the hospital claiming to have been attacked by the same man many times. The detectives learn that the precincts were not testing their rape kits and the investigation leads to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Fair to Remember

programme.title: Modern Family: ClosetCon '13
programme.desc: With some urging from Claire, Jay begrudgingly agrees to return to ClosetCon this year, and things get interesting when Jay is reunited with some old colleagues.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Big Game

programme.title: Modern Family: The Old Man and the Tree

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 1
programme.desc: Everyone goes on a cruise, except Gina who accidentally missed it. Martin meets a beautiful woman named Ellen who he thinks is depressed, and Tommy and Pam try to be friends.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 2
programme.desc: While on a cruise, Tommy finds Pam in bed with Cole.

programme.title: Martin: You Play Too Much
programme.desc: Martin helps a burglar rob his apartment because he thinks it's part of a prank by Pam.

programme.title: Martin: Ain't That About a Ditch
programme.desc: Gina's mother comes to visit while she is away and wants to spend time with Martin.

programme.title: Martin: I, Martin, Take Thee Pam?
programme.desc: Martin discovers that his marriage is invalid and that he's actually married to Pam.

programme.title: Martin: Power to the People's Court
programme.desc: After Tommy accidentally backs into Sheneneh's car, she serves him with a court summons.

programme.title: Martin: Auction
programme.desc: Martin gives his cuckoo clock to Pam who donates it to a charity auction.

programme.title: Martin: Daddy Dearest
programme.desc: Tommy's father visits and wants to make him into a man.

programme.title: Living Single: Rags to Riches
programme.desc: Regine is disgusted when the boutique is converted into a discount store.

programme.title: Living Single: The James Bond
programme.desc: Khadijah and Synclaire disagree on how to spend a mature savings bond.

programme.title: Living Single: The Handyman Can
programme.desc: A bookshelf that Overton built collapses, killing a cat in Synclaire's charge.

programme.title: Living Single: He Works Hard for the Money
programme.desc: Kyle is uncomfortable with the gifts and attention he's receiving from a famous client.

programme.title: Movie: Dope
programme.desc: A geeky high school senior, living in a rough neighbourhood in L.A., is invited to a huge, underground party, which propels him and his friends into a wild adventure.

programme.title: Movie: All About the Benjamins
programme.desc: A bounty hunter and the con man he's pursuing stumble upon a multi-million dollar stash of diamonds. They are forced to team up in order to catch the criminal responsible.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Blackout
programme.desc: Michael goes out of his way to get the family out of the house so he can have solitude.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Man of the Year
programme.desc: Michael does not win the Small Businessman of the Year Award and has a bad reaction.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Jr.'s Risky Business, Part 1
programme.desc: Michael returns from a night out to find Jr. in a compromising position with his girl.

programme.title: Movie: One Royal Holiday
programme.desc: A woman offers stranded family a place to stay during a blizzard. Unbeknownst to her, they are members of a royal family. Despite their different backgrounds, the woman shows her guests what a small-town Christmas is all about.

programme.title: Movie: Picture a Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: A world-travelling photographer takes some time off at Christmas to care for her grandmother. While there, she meets her neighbour, who needs help caring for his young nephew, and love develops.

programme.title: Movie: On the 12th Date of Christmas
programme.desc: Two co-workers vying for the same promotion are tasked with creating a 12 Days of Christmas scavenger hunt to promote the premiere of a new hotel.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Graceland: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: A free-spirited former Graceland tour guide, awaiting news of her dream museum job, meets a busy single father on a Graceland tour and agrees to be his temporary nanny for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is whisked away to Europe when her boyfriend reveals he's actually a prince.

programme.title: Movie: Hats Off to Christmas!
programme.desc: The assistant manager of the Santa Hat Factory must train the boss’s son for the job she was passed up for, but ends up falling for him.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Christmas
programme.desc: Nicknamed 'Miss Christmas,' the official tree finder for the Radcliffee tree lighting, is left desperate to find the perfect tree. A letter sends her to a small town and a man who doesn't want to part with this tree.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Cartwright's
programme.desc: A single mom is unemployed and broke at Christmas. She is desperate to find a job in order to make her daughter's holiday a happy one.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Christmas
programme.desc: A resort developer heads to Christmas, Colorado, to scope out a new piece of land. While away, she has a minor car accident and meets the towns handsome sheriff, who helps her have a Christmas to remember.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Grammy award-winning singer Cyndi Lauper to share her upcoming projects and how her podcast is helping those with psoriasis. Award-winning restaurateur Jamie DeMent prepares buttermilk roasted chicken.

programme.title: Movie: Sharing Christmas
programme.desc: A real estate developer is given the opportunity to transform an old shopping complex into a prime location. Unfortunately, there is one tenant who is holding out, the Christmas shop owner he met just days earlier.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Cookies
programme.desc: A small-town factory, Aunt Sally's Christmas Cookie Company, is sold to large conglomerate. Their executive must seal the deal and shut down the factory, the town's lifeblood, but things become complicated when she meets the new owner.

programme.title: Movie: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: Paul 'Wrecking' Crewe, a former football superstar, ends up in prison after a drunk driving incident, and is recruited by the warden to put together an inmate football team to compete against the prison guards.

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers
programme.desc: A small-time drug dealer hires a fake family to help him smuggle drugs into the country.

programme.title: Movie: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: Paul 'Wrecking' Crewe, a former football superstar, ends up in prison after a drunk driving incident, and is recruited by the warden to put together an inmate football team to compete against the prison guards.

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers
programme.desc: A small-time drug dealer hires a fake family to help him smuggle drugs into the country.

programme.title: South Park: Lil' Crime Stoppers
programme.desc: After they return a missing doll to a little girl, the Park County Police Department recognizes the boys' efforts and names them Junior Deputies.

programme.title: South Park: Butt Out
programme.desc: After singing and dancing representatives from an anti-smoking campaign rap about the dangers of smoking, the kids at South Park Elementary believe it to be cooler than the campaign, and take up the habit.

programme.title: South Park: Stupid Spoiled Whore Video Play Set
programme.desc: Disturbed by the corruptive influence Paris Hilton has on all little girls in South Park, one of the town's favourite citizens, Mr. Slave, challenges her to a 'whore-off.'

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan: Chinpoko Mon. Little do they know, they are being brainwashed by the Japanese to once again bomb Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever (Flashbacks)
programme.desc: A freak accident leaves the Elementary school bus teetering precariously on the edge of a cliff, and it's up to Ms. Crabtree to find help. While they wait, the kids reflect on their adventures and how they got out of so many 'sticky situations.'

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Believing that people who are born disabled are better than those who are disabled through an accident, Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the 'Crips.'

programme.title: South Park: Clubhouses
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle are psyched to have Wendy and Bebe visit their clubhouse for a game of 'Truth or Dare,' but first they have to build one. When they won't let Carman join, he and Kenny build their own clubhouse and invite teenage girls to play with them.

programme.title: South Park: The Entity
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device. Meanwhile, Kyle tries to ditch his cousin, also named Kyle, who comes to South Park for an extended visit.

programme.title: Movie: Candy Cane Christmas
programme.desc: A girl searching for a new tradition to lift her holiday spirits realizes that it’s not the traditions we cherish, but the people we spend them with. And, while preparing for her new tradition, she stumbles upon the final thing her Christmas was missing.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Aunt
programme.desc: When a woman returns home to Tennessee two weeks before Christmas to take care of her niece and nephew while their parents are away, the last thing she expects is to reconnect with her childhood best friend.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle Belle
