programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Healthy Eats to Health Care Solutions
programme.desc: Quick Bytes with Chef Ralph Pagano-Nature's Eats nut flours are on the menu; sleep aid patches for youngsters; ways to tell if your body is rusting from the inside out.

programme.title: Movie: Twelve Wishes for Christmas
programme.desc: When a mysterious lady grants a woman 12 wishes at Christmas and they magically come true, she must work to set things right after the fallout.

programme.title: Movie: Three Holiday Tails
programme.desc: Retirees play matchmaker with their neighbour and her ex-husband.

programme.title: Movie: On Strike for Christmas
programme.desc: A mother goes on strike when all of her efforts for a perfect family Christmas get taken for granted. Chaos ensues when she convinces all the other neighbourhood mothers to join in, and the strike takes on a life of its own when the local news finds out.

programme.title: Movie: The Magical Christmas Shoes
programme.desc: A pair of magical shoes appear during a young woman's holiday season and help her discover her Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: 5-Year Old Vanished
programme.desc: Five-year-old Haleigh Cummings disappears from her home after her dad’s girlfriend puts her to bed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: DC Madam: The Woman Who Knew Too Much

programme.title: How It Really Happened: JFK Jr's Final Flight
programme.desc: Examining the factors that led to the crash that killed John F. Kennedy Jr. and a never before seen interview with a person who may have been the last person to speak to JFK Jr, moments before the crash.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion

programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Cliff Home
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a technologically advanced, solar-heated house on a cliff overlooking the vast plains of Colorado. Their Passive Plus home includes solar, passive solar, septic and water catchment technology ideal for off-grid living.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The River Wild
programme.desc: The Kilchers call in a favour hoping to finish their largest project on schedule. They have 48hrs to rebuild a cabin and a long cattle fence.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Whole New Frontier
programme.desc: As spring approaches, the Kilchers prepare for a potentially devastating wildfire season. But when COVID-19 threatens the homestead and crews are evacuated, the family must come together and adapt like never before.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Whole New Frontier
programme.desc: The Kilchers prepare to adapt like never before as a potentially devastating wildfire season begins and Covid-19 threatens the homestead.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Homestead Closed
programme.desc: An unprecedented new chapter kicks off on the homestead as the Kilchers film themselves coping with Alaska's stay-at-home order amid a growing pandemic. Resources must be stretched, homeschooling proves difficult and Atz Lee's PTSD resurfaces.

programme.title: Terrorism Close Calls: Transatlantic Bomb Plot
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force stops a plot formed by three homegrown US operatives and Al Qaeda designed to wreak havoc on New York's subway system.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Do or Die
programme.desc: In the season finale, Marty struggles to finish the cliff-top cabin. The family must risk another river crossing to get materials across for a final crucial build. Misty and Maciah begin their own dream cabin on the homestead.

programme.desc: An unprecedented new chapter kicks off on the homestead as the Kilchers film themselves coping with Alaska's stay-at-home order amid a growing pandemic. Resources must be stretched, homeschooling proves difficult and Atz Lee's PTSD resurfaces.

programme.title: Terrorism Close Calls: Transatlantic Bomb Plot
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force stops a plot formed by three homegrown US operatives and Al Qaeda designed to wreak havoc on New York's subway system.

programme.desc: In the season finale, Marty struggles to finish the cliff-top cabin. The family must risk another river crossing to get materials across for a final crucial build. Misty and Maciah begin their own dream cabin on the homestead.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Salt Flat Rod
programme.desc: A hot rod lover from California challenges Steve to transform a 1931 Ford Model A into a salt flats racing machine, but getting it done before his client returns to Vegas will take a miracle.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Ranch Rod
programme.desc: Steve digs back into his Montana roots to build his cowboy buddy J.R. the ultimate ranch-rod by Frankenstein-ing together a pair of vintage Dodge trucks.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Race Night in America: Rush Hour
programme.desc: Pennsylvania racers hit the streets where they've been busted before for a night of grudge racing ... and luck is not on their side.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Race Night in America: Red Handed
programme.desc: Racers search for new roads and rivals in Oklahoma, Pennsylvania and Texas.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Richard Rawlings and the Monkeys forge gear-head history, to be the first to pack a '79 Scout with a 707 horsepower Hellcrate engine for a huge payday.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Beyond Reasonable Scout
programme.desc: The Monkeys race to be the first-ever to drop a Hellcat motor in their '79 International Scout and fulfill hot-rodder Richard's quest to fetch the world record for the most-expensive ever sold. And Richard tries to convince a friend to buy a '63 Stingray.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Keeping It Shelby
programme.desc: The Monkeys prepare Richard's beloved '68 Mustang for the prestigious Shelby Mustang Meet and Richard buys a one-of-a-kind van once owned by a Mopar icon.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: A Far-Out Brady Bunch Build
programme.desc: The Monkeys continue work on Barry Williams' 1969 Plymouth Satellite. As the deadline nears, Richard and his crew must defeat the curse of the tiki idol if they want to meet Barry's expectations before the car's debut on HGTV.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: No Second Chances
programme.desc: The Monkeys put the pedal to the metal in their final attempt to finish the '72 Buick Riviera super-build in time for SEMA. The team's integrity is on the line and $300,000 has been invested so failure is not an option.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Wranglin' World Records
programme.desc: The Monkeys begin work on a 2018 Jeep Wrangler, the second of two jeeps they're customizing for the Gary Sinese Foundation's Veteran's Day auction. Meanwhile, Richard makes a deal on a '55 Crown Vic he hopes to donate to the Gas Monkey Foundation.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Race Against Time
programme.desc: The Monkeys race to finish their Buick Indy Racer for a deep-pocket client. Next, a collector wheels and deals for Richard's 1975 Datsun 280-Z and Brian Bass reveals upcoming changes at Gas Monkey Garage.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Quick-Flippin' a Caddy
programme.desc: Richard pays big bucks hoping to use a '63 Cadillac for a quick flip project. The guys do a bang-up job on a budget but Jason goes rogue and risks tanking the whole thing. Later, Russell overpays for a '47 Fleetline that looks bomb but doesn't run.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: The Consequences of Truth
programme.desc: Ari struggles with the news about her pregnancy. Deavan and Jihoon make a big move. Yazan starts to question his relationship with Brittany. Melyza reveals her secret to Tim. Armando's family reacts to his engagement to Kenny.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Bris-fully Ignorant
programme.desc: Ari makes a dramatic choice about her son's future. Deavan has suspicions about Jihoon's job. Kenny and Armando disagree on parenting style. Sumit faces criminal charges in court, and Brittany finally gets news about her divorce.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: Bris-fully Ignorant
programme.desc: Ari makes a dramatic choice about her son's future. Deavan has suspicions about Jihoon's job. Kenny and Armando disagree on parenting style. Sumit faces criminal charges in court, and Brittany finally gets news about her divorce.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Are You Done Yelling?
programme.desc: Yazan begs for his brother's help. Sumit finally goes to court for his divorce. Kenny and Armando apply for a marriage license. Parenting decisions set Ari and Bini at odds. Deavan finds questionable photos on Jihoon's phone. Tim's mom comes for a visit.

programme.title: I Love a Mama's Boy: You're Not Invited
programme.desc: Matt wants to spend Valentine's Day with his mom, while Shekeb disinvites his mom to date night. Justina's first steps toward wedding planning are overtaken by her future mother-in-law, Annette.

programme.desc: What does Joe do every morning before work? And where was Q employed before becoming a fireman?

programme.desc: Find out why Sal thought the production designer was tricking him, which Joker loves all things motorized and why Murr started taking piano lessons.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 11
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Does Hip-Hop Reject Women?

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Horror Movies: Cursed or Coincidence?
programme.desc: Horror films are big business for Hollywood studios, and scary movies are more popular than ever. However, Hollywood may be tempting fate with deaths, unexplained events and supernatural scares on set.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: What's Killing Music's Biggest Stars?
programme.desc: The pressures of fame have led many celebrities down a path of addiction and substance abuse. The situation is worse now than ever making prescription medication the new drug of choice.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: NXIVM: Self Help or Sex Cult?
programme.desc: Hollywood stars have always searched for higher meaning outside of fame. But when self-help groups like NXIVM prey on the Hollywood elite, their cult-like tactics leave a wake of destruction.

programme.title: Botched: Most Outrageous Celebrity Patients
programme.desc: A countdown of the top 10 most outrageous celebrities.

programme.title: Botched: Human Dolls
programme.desc: Plastic surgeons Terry Dubrow and Paul Nassif treat a woman with a uni-boob, an actress who has had six surgeries in search of the perfect nose, and make a house call for Justin, a self-proclaimed human doll.

programme.title: Dr. 90210: Snip-a-dee-doo-dah
programme.desc: Dr. Killeen performs the biggest breast reduction of her career on a patient with size M breasts, a transgender model wants Dr. Lee to make her nose look more feminine and former Pussycat Doll, Jessi Peralta seeks Dr. Cat’s help to repair her torn labia.

programme.title: Dr. 90210: Facing Your Fears
programme.desc: Dr. Q is shocked to see a baseball-sized cyst on her patient’s face, a 31-year-old yoga instructor recently discovers she has the BRCA gene and goes to Dr. Killeen for a straight to implant double mastectomy.

programme.title: Dr. 90210: The Lift that keeps on Giving
programme.desc: Dr. Lee helps a 60-year-old woman look as young as she feels with a facelift, Dr. Cat gives a WAG her booty back and Dr. Q restores her husband’s hair.

programme.title: Dr. 90210: Summer Body
programme.desc: Dr. Q takes on a risky two-part surgery on a man who underwent a massive weight loss, a woman with pectus excavatum comes to Dr. Kelly to mask her deformity and a patient consults with Dr. Cat about getting dimples added to her face.

programme.title: Dr. 90210: A Model Patient
programme.desc: Dr. Lee pieces back together her patient’s stretched out and torn earlobes, Dr. Cat helps a plus size model who wants her excess skin removed and a southern belle hopes Dr. Q can help her stop sweating excessively due to her hyperhidrosis.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Botched: I Like Big Butts and I Did Not Die!
programme.desc: The doctors take a patient who nearly died after a mommy makeover gone wrong. Then, a man plagued by his flat nose needs it fixed so he can propose.

programme.title: Botched: Double Bubble and No Butt Trouble
programme.desc: A pop star impersonator visits the doctors after silicone injections left her with a dented chin. Then, a young woman finally reveals her bad boob job to her mom after years of suffering.

programme.title: Botched: Sticky Nipples and Paparazzi Nightmares
programme.desc: A mother of two has to duct tape up her breasts, and later, a young nurse has nose raved by nasal file. A D-list celebrity would like to get an A-list nose.

programme.title: Botched: Meet the Future Mrs. Paul Nassif
programme.desc: A love-crazy Canadian uses her boobs to get to Paul and later, former model has nose fixed before her wedding.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Gettin' Gifty with It
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer teaches the six bakers a lesson in repurposing holiday gifts in the first round, when they must turn panettone, the classic holiday Italian sweet bread, into an entirely new dessert.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: North Pole Vaulting
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer challenges the five bakers to create assigned desserts that are inspired by and look like Santa Claus. To secure their place in the final four, the bakers are tasked with creating impressive cakes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Traditions With a Twist
programme.desc: Some of the tastiest treats of Hanukkah are gold-covered chocolate coins, and Jesse Palmer challenges the four remaining bakers to give the classic treat a twist by incorporating candied orange, espresso beans, smoked salt or toasted coconut.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Christmas Day Delights
programme.desc: Nothing beats waking up to the smell of a holiday brunch, so Jesse Palmer challenges the three remaining bakers to make a Christmas morning brunch using the classic holiday flavours of gingerbread, cinnamon and eggnog.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Surprise Holiday Parade
programme.desc: Santa makes a spur-of-the-moment decision to kick off the season by throwing the biggest, craziest holiday parade ever. Raven-Symone hosts as five teams of cake and sugar artists compete to impress judges Shinmin Li and Erin McGinn, showing what might go.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: All About That Baste
programme.desc: Bobby Flay has a full house for Turkey Day when he's joined by Food Network's Damaris Phillips and Man v. Food host Casey Webb. Chefs Kevin Grossi and Lindsay Porter want a second helping of victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Gobble Till You Wobble
programme.desc: Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and comedian Jay Pharoah look to gobble up a victory over Bobby Flay as chefs Jason Bissell and Tirzah Love face off.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Dynamic Duo
programme.desc: Formidable duo Michael Symon and Giada De Laurentiis reunite to try to continue their winning streak against Bobby Flay. They've brought in Italian master chefs Jessica Gamble and Fabrizio Schenardi to challenge Bobby with a dish he's never won before.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Superchef, Supermodel
programme.desc: Superchef Anne Burrell teams up with supermodel Gigi Hadid to give Bobby a real taste of the spotlight. They're hoping international chefs Melissa Araujo and Max Robbins can blind Bobby with their brilliance and cat walk out a win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Windy City Wants More
programme.desc: Toronto's David Adjey and Chicago's Cory Morris determine whether Chopped judge Scott Conant or Internet star Hannah Hart will go up against Bobby Flay.

programme.desc: Sunny Anderson kicks things off with cranberries in her easy cheese and cranberry stuffed grilled chicken. Katie Lee uses butternut squash in her farro and butternut squash salad.

programme.title: Chopped: Time and Space

programme.title: Chopped: Military Salute

programme.title: Chopped: Got Your Goat?
programme.desc: The chefs race to figure out what to do with a seafood product and some boozy veggies in the first round. Then, the judges must decide who's got the chops to get goat chops just right in the second round. It all ends with a tough dessert basket.

programme.title: The American Game: Integration
programme.desc: As much as any other sport, the history of college football tells the history of American race relations. You can't appreciate the sport's complexities without knowing how long the road has been, and continues to be, towards equal rights.

programme.title: The American Game: Evolution
programme.desc: College football has evolved in so many transformative ways. All throughout its history, the sport's constant evolutions have had common threads, with officials and coaches striving to make it safer, more exciting and more entertaining.

programme.title: Championship Drive: Who's In?
programme.desc: College football experts debate who the top four teams are in the country and preview the rankings that are released on Tuesday night.

programme.desc: Walden tries to loosen Zoey up by sharing a couple of Berta's special brownies with her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sips, Sonnets and Sodomy

programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey introduce their mothers to one another. Meanwhile, Jake and Eldridge ask Walden to drive them to a high school party.

programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: Roseanne: Looking for Loans in All the Wrong Places

programme.title: North Woods Law: Twists and Turns
programme.desc: Officer McDermott finds an abandoned truck, sparking a winding investigation. Officer Holmes and Sgt. Lucas rescue paddlers of a capsized canoe. Later, Holmes responds to a moose accident, while OFC. Frye consoles a bereft woman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mountaintop Mystery
programme.desc: On Mt. Monadnock, a severed finger is found, sending a team and K-9 Wyatt to search for other possible body parts. A family of repeat offenders are found riding their ATVs without proper protective gear, and a man admits to an illegal bear kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trail Blazers
programme.desc: A deer hunter pleads ignorance when caught with tree stands on private property. Officer Crouse catches a group of ATV speedsters, and Officer MacFazden investigates a suspicious bear kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have from shot the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Invisible Evidence
programme.desc: Officer Egan investigates the mysterious death of a deer. Officer Courtney and Lt. Cheney help a seal stuck in a tidal creek. Officer Bronson catches a young fisherman in a lie. And Officers lead the search for a woman with a head injury.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trail Blazers
programme.desc: A deer hunter pleads ignorance when caught with tree stands on private property. Officer Crouse catches a group of ATV speedsters, and Officer MacFazden investigates a suspicious bear kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mountaintop Mystery
programme.desc: On Mt. Monadnock, a severed finger is found, sending a team and K-9 Wyatt to search for other possible body parts. A family of repeat offenders are found riding their ATVs without proper protective gear, and a man admits to an illegal bear kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: For a game warden, there's no such thing as being off the clock. Wardens McBrine and Carter embark on a multi-day hunt for a wanted man. Warden Herring investigates a mysterious shack on city property. Warden McKenney works to remove a deadly hazard.

programme.title: North Woods Law: And the Little Ones Too
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead beaver in a Skowhegan parking lot leads Warden Parker on an exhaustive investigation involving surveillance cameras, anonymous informants and the assistance of the local police.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Deer Deception
programme.desc: It's deer season, the most popular big game hunting season in the state.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: With added facts from the field, Officer Kevin Bronson races to get a driver under the influence off the road. Officer Eric Hannett catches two teenagers joyriding an ATV on a public road. Up north, Officer Bob Mancini helps evacuate an injured hiker.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: Winter's wrath is nearing and to prepare for the unforgiving season when temperatures drop to -50 degrees, everyone must fight to stay alive.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Everything Is Hungry
programme.desc: Winter is here and the time for preparation is over. Bob deals with the ramifications of crashing his plane. To begin trapping, Heimo must find a way to cross a newly frozen river. Ray and his daughters set out to catch much needed meat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Last Sunset
programme.desc: The cost of life hundreds of miles from civilization is front and center. Tyler and Ashley trek 15 miles to a lake cabin to run their dog team and search for food. Bob leaves home to see his daughter and assess the damage of his crashed plane.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Into the Darkness
programme.desc: Day one of darkness has arrived in the refuge. Heimo's golden rule to never get caught miles from home in the dark is in jeopardy. The Lewis Family prepares for a life changing event as their daughters prepare to leave and head out on their own in town.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Nothing Lasts Forever
programme.desc: As they near the end of winter, the refuge residents look toward the future. Bob trains his pup Ruger to be a hunting dog, while Ray prepares for an empty nest life without his daughters. Heimo's ambitious mind pushes his aging body to the brink.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The End of Darkness
programme.desc: Sunlight finally returns to the refuge. Heimo's stopped in his tracks by -50 degree temperatures. The Seldens make their home in a new cabin. Bob tries to salvage his worst season in 40 years and questions his future.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Home Again
programme.desc: With summer fading and trapping season around the corner, Heimo Korth works to build a new cabin for his family. The Seldens settle in and look to fill their larder with moose meat, while the Lewis family attempts to reach an old homestead by boat.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Only the Strong

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Over the Top
programme.desc: A World War One helmet blasts into the shop. Corey and Rick are presented with a gun holster used on the long running TV show Gunsmoke.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gone With the Schwinn
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with a huge truckload of personal tapes from Rat Pack legend Sammy Davis Jr. Rick meets a man with a mysterious miniature cannon believed to be from the 18th century.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Luck of the Draw
programme.desc: At high noon the Pawn Stars look at a collection thought to belong to our country's most legendary Western lawman--Wyatt Earp.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Corey's Big Play
programme.desc: The guys check out a 1924 Dodge Brothers sedan complete with the original wooden wheels. A man drags in a 19th-century ball and chain that's inside a Wells Fargo strongbox.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Smells Like Pawn Spirit
programme.desc: A guy brings in a Charles Lindbergh doll from the 1920s. Someone brings in an antique poster advertising a sword-swallowing act. A man brings in a harmonica that once belonged to Steven Tyler.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Man. Make. Fire.
programme.desc: Rick and the Old Man eye a 1949 Hudson Commodore. A premium luxury ride of the post-war era.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: You Snooze, You Lose
programme.desc: Rick checks out a German two-handed sword that was built in the early 1600s. Then, a set of 1933 baseball cards are brought into the shop. Later, Corey's new neighbours are keeping him up at night.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Go for Chum
programme.desc: Raise a glass with the Pawn Stars when Rick spots an authentic moonshine still. Then, Corey and Chumlee are star struck when a man brings in a huge collection of 1940s and 50s celebrity autographed postcards.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick's a Riot
programme.desc: Rock out with the Pawn Stars when a 1969 Gibson Les Paul jams into the shop. Then, Chum tries to score with a Los Angeles Lakers backpack signed by members of the 2004 team. Later, Corey calls Rick out on his most annoying habit.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Chum System
programme.desc: A nightstick thought to have belonged to Ulysses S. Grant arrives at the shop. Then, Corey and Chum check out a vintage skateboard sticker collection. Chumlee tries to prove he is a master at multitasking.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wake Up Call
programme.desc: Dive in with the Pawn Stars when a 1964 770 Amphicar floats into the shop. Then, Corey and Chum are on a roll when they check out a 1939 National Bowling Association championship ring.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Captain Rick
programme.desc: A medal from British explorer Captain Cook lands in the shop. Chum hits the green when checking out a golf putter from the famed 1963 Frank Sinatra Invitational. Later, when Rick's stress level hits a new high, Chumlee tries to calm him down.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Underground Pawn
programme.desc: Rick checks out a first edition book about the Underground Railroad from the 1800's. Then, he gets his hands on a full set of baseball cards that were only ever handed out to troops during Desert Shield.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: All Hail Rick
programme.desc: It's a royal affair when revolutionary war documents signed by King George III reign into the shop. Then, Chum feels the need for speed when checking out a pair of Cushman scooters. Later, after checking out a BB gun, the guys take part in a shootout.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Avengers Assemble
programme.desc: Two original No.1 comic books from the 'Avengers' and 'Giant Size X-Men' series fly into the shop. Then, Corey is faced with a mystery when he is presented with a cane belonging to William Pinkerton from the infamous Pinkerton detective agency.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Every Rose Has Its Pawn
programme.desc: An original sketch of the Marine Corps War Memorial; a Poison platinum disc signed by Bret Michaels; a Roman oil lamp from the first century lights its way in; a Military certificate from the Vietnam War.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: All Pawns on Deck
programme.desc: 18th century engravings of the Spanish Armada; explicit wax recordings from the 1890s; a 1980s transforming Coca-Cola robot can; a 1900s Teddy Roosevelt Bears Pitcher.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gotham Pawn
programme.desc: Limited edition Batman and Joker Bolin Guitars; a bronze sculpture by M.L. Snowden; a pair of signed Betty Crocker letters; a WWII era Adolf Hitler pincushion.

programme.title: Snapped: Jerrie Lynn Acklin
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of a beloved nurse leads Arkansas investigators down a twisted path of familial betrayal. As detectives hunt for the missing woman, evidence upturned along the way points toward deadly foul play.

programme.desc: The Carr brothers arrive in Wichita intending to commit robberies, but their plans quickly escalate to a murderous spree the likes of which Kansas had never seen. The reign of terror by the brothers is later known as the 'Wichita Massacre.'

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rosas
programme.desc: After a man is found brutally murdered inside his own bar a murder mystery unfolds over the span of years. Detectives believe it's a business deal gone bad and must remain steadfastly dedicated to the case after hitting several dead ends.

programme.title: Snapped: Crystal Weimer
programme.desc: A young man is brutally murdered and a woman is found covered in blood just hours later. She is adamant that she is innocent, and later a twist in the case shocks everyone involved.

programme.desc: A carjacking could have ties to international espionage; the murderer may turn out to be someone much closer to home.

programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of a beloved nurse leads Arkansas investigators down a twisted path of familial betrayal. As detectives hunt for the missing woman, evidence upturned along the way points toward deadly foul play.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Deadly Premonition

programme.title: Dateline: The Prussian Blue Mystery
programme.desc: When a San Diego woman arrives at an emergency room, she is near death. Her hair is falling out and her vital signs are fading, even though there are no signs of an infection or injury.

programme.title: Dateline: The Match
programme.desc: A high school girl is nearly beaten to death in her home and goes under hypnosis to identify her attacker.

programme.title: Dateline: The Match
programme.desc: A high school girl is nearly beaten to death in her home and goes under hypnosis to identify her attacker.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The Job
programme.desc: Kensi goes undercover as a thief in the hopes of discovering the object that a world-class burglar intended to steal.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: I-15 Murders
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a supermarket. In the store, Grissom finds a bathroom stall door that claims five women have been killed. Warrick is caught in a casino on duty and is paired with a reluctant Sara.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Rocket Man
programme.desc: After a rocket engine expert is killed, NCIS tech operator Eric Beale goes undercover for the first time to ensure that the classified technology used to build satellites is safe.

programme.title: NCIS: Child's Play
programme.desc: A dead marine's day job at a government think tank leads Gibbs and the team into the life of a 12-year-old prodigy who may be the killer's next target.

programme.title: NCIS: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: After Anthony DiNozzo, Sr. is found in a car with a dead body in the trunk and no memory of the previous night, the team must figure out if he is capable of murder. Meanwhile, Tony is sidelined for this case and must prove his father's innocence.

programme.title: NCIS: Shell Shock
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant who recently returned home from the Middle East is found dead from a brutal attack. Gibbs sees that the victim's friend, who is suffering from PTSD, has experience overseas that may provide a key link to the crime.

programme.title: NCIS: Shell Shock
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant who recently returned home from the Middle East is found dead from a brutal attack. Gibbs sees that the victim's friend, who is suffering from PTSD, has experience overseas that may provide a key link to the crime.

programme.title: NCIS: Grounded
programme.desc: While stuck at the Dulles airport due to inclement weather, DiNozzo, Bishop and her husband Jake work an NCIS case involving an elevated terrorist threat at Northeast airports during the Thanksgiving surge.

programme.title: NCIS: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: In the hopes of sparing a family further tragedy, the Secretary of the Navy calls on NCIS to help a sailor battling leukemia locate a bone marrow transplant. Also, Bishop returns home to Oklahoma for the Thanksgiving holiday.

programme.title: NCIS: Enemy Combatant
programme.desc: After NCIS Agent Bishop is sent to Gitmo to gather evidence for a navy chaplain murder case, she questions her previous work at the NSA. Also, Bishop's brothers, John and Robert, visit for the Thanksgiving holiday and pester her co-workers.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Every Man's Dream
programme.desc: Homer is diagnosed with narcolepsy, but instead of returning home with his prescription medication, he returns home drunk. He and Marge visit a marriage counsellor and have a trial separation, during which Homer begins dating a twenty-something.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Friends and Family
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires the Simpsons to play his live-in virtual reality family, but excludes Homer so that he may play dad. Now alone, Homer finds a new best friend in girl-next-door Julia, who eats, drinks and thinks like him.

programme.title: Family Guy: Hefty Shades of Gray
programme.desc: After Peter's hair turns white from a ghost-hunting adventure in his house with the guys, his new look grabs the attention of local news anchor Tom Tucker. Under Tucker's guidance, he learns the ways of reporting fake news.

programme.title: Family Guy: Married With Cancer
programme.desc: Brian meets and quickly falls in love with a woman named Jess, who reveals she has cancer. After she receives devastating news regarding her diagnosis, Brian proposes marriage to her.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dead Dog Walking

programme.title: Family Guy: Emmy-Winning Episode

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Hunt for Flight MH370
programme.desc: Since 2014, the fate of Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 has remained a mystery. It's still unclear if it crashed, and if it did, the wreckage has yet to be found.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: Diabolical: Daddy's Little Nightmare
programme.desc: In 2017, Federal Heights, Colorado is filled with fear when 69-year-old veteran Bill Mussack is reported missing gone without a trace. Police act fast to uncover a diabolical killer with a heinous plot, before this malicious murderer strikes again.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lie For Me
programme.desc: Air Force veteran Michael Giles disappears along with his savings of $206,000. Detectives discover a woman named Kwaneta Harris has been draining the man's accounts. But as they dig deeper, detectives uncover a massive conspiracy of greed and murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Someone's Lying
programme.desc: On April 17, 2015, a Virginia hunter stumbles upon a grisly discovery in the woods: a woman with an execution style gun shot wound to the back of her head. As detectives begin their investigation, they uncover a twisted web of lies and crimes.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster I Married
programme.desc: When Cindy first fell in love with Bobby, she never imagined that she would one day regret not committing murder. But years after she first discovered the horrifying truth, she is still haunted by the night when she decided not to kill him in his sleep.

programme.title: Killer in Question: The Hunted
programme.desc: On November 17th, 1990, two deer hunters are found shot dead in the woods of Michigan. Eleven-years later, cold case detectives arrest Jeff Titus on suspicion of the murders, but the original detectives on the case believe Titus is innocent.

programme.title: American Monster: Once a Princess
programme.desc: Hyrah Frasch is no ordinary baby. The photogenic one-year-old already has her own website and looks set to become an internet sensation. But when a tragic accident occurs in the family swimming pool, police discover a brutal killer hiding in her midst.

programme.title: Killer in Question: The Hunted
programme.desc: On November 17th, 1990, two deer hunters are found shot dead in the woods of Michigan. Eleven-years later, cold case detectives arrest Jeff Titus on suspicion of the murders, but the original detectives on the case believe Titus is innocent.

programme.title: American Monster: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: When outgoing Beth Spaulding meets shy Jason Risenburg it seems that love has conquered loneliness and the two quickly marry. Illness and bad luck push their happiness to the brink, triggering a tornado of lies and deception that tears them apart.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: The Happy Groom
programme.desc: Michael Reese, 40, is a good husband and loving son, who doesn't seem to have an enemy in the world. But when his wife Cindy comes home to find him shot dead, police must grapple with the secrets they uncover one of which led to his murder.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: 20-year old Justin Newman lands a great job in construction, but when he disappears on the day his new boss is found brutally murdered, a nation-wide search for Justin uncovers a sinister plot.

programme.title: Web of Lies: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: A young girl has lewd photos of her taken at a party, with no memory of the night. Her world is turned upside down and the public shaming pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Web of Lies: D is for Deadly
programme.desc: Dallas teen track star Shania Gray is left traumatized after being raped while babysitting. When a new Facebook friend offers support, she opens up to him.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Playing Doctor
programme.desc: 24-year-old Jessika Rovell falls for Jeffrey Marsalis' charm and good looks but when she discovers his secret online life as Dr. Jeff, she realizes she's been dating a monster who stalks dating websites.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Shifting Stories
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman vanishes, investigators must sort through a series of puzzling clues to solve a deadly mystery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Greed Lies and Murder
programme.desc: A mother of three disappears from the home of her wealthy older boyfriend.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Sirens in the Night
programme.desc: The body of a young woman is found in the ashes of a fire.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Her Last Night Out
programme.desc: They head out into the night, full of youthful life and promise, but they never come back. Now, clues from behind bars may help solve the mysteries that surround the disturbing disappearances of two women.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Clues Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A mother of three is gunned down in a church basement where she's set to teach a fitness class. Police find surveillance video showing a figure in full police body armor stalking the floor in the lead-up to the slaughter.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Guns and Secrets
programme.desc: One young woman is found with a shotgun wound to her head shortly after moving in with her new boyfriend. Then, a couple planning their wedding are gunned down in their own backyard.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Why Did She Leave?
programme.desc: She is an innocent bride-to-be; he's a six-year-old schoolboy. Both are on the road, away from home, when they disappear.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell

programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Commanders
programme.desc: This is the story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of the second Iraq conflict.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: IT Cosmetics
programme.desc: Shop a cutting edge, problem solving, innovative makeup and skincare line with anti-aging technology.

programme.title: Jayne & Pat's Holiday Checklist

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Smilin' on Anna Maria Island
programme.desc: After years of vacationing in the area, a woman and her grandmother are ready to purchase a home of their own in the coastal community of Anna Maria Island, FL.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Not for Beginners
programme.desc: Time is running out for the builders to complete their projects. Chris gets help installing solar panels and sets up cameras to watch for bears. Meanwhile, Josh works on the custom log stairs as Jeremy takes his time to cut and build custom windows.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Look What They've Done
programme.desc: The builders are in the final push to finish their cabins before winter strikes and they must shut down. Josh and his team fight the elements to install the wood stove and finish the roof. Chris and his wife rush to install kitchen counters and furniture.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Alaska's railroads, bridges and highways make a once impossible environment accessible for all.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Alaska's railroads, bridges and highways make a once impossible environment accessible for all.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game On
programme.desc: The three build teams kick off their builds in remote Alaskan settings. Bruce Chambers and his crew begin a cabin on LaTouche Island. Mark Sams and his crew begin a cabin in Freshwater Bay. Dave Poppert and his family begin a compound on Point MacKenzie.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Piece of the Pie
programme.desc: At Bruce Chambers' build, running out of supplies has put the build at a standstill. Mark Sams and his crew are challenged by getting their foundation level and square. Dave Poppert and his family deal with record setting heat.

programme.title: Amazing Space: Irish Pub Hideaway
programme.desc: Eric meets with a couple in dire need of their own space separate from their daughter and her friends. Eric transforms their basement into an Irish-influenced tavern perfect for getting away from the kids.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Northeast Farmhouse
programme.desc: Mike, Robert, and the Black Dog Salvage crew save parts of an early 1800s farmhouse and barn in Edison, NJ. Key items include corner plinths, thick floorboards, and an elaborate front entryway. Mike also builds a daybed swing with spindles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From a Foursquare Farmhouse in Roanoke, VA
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew take on a foursquare farmhouse in Roanoke, VA. Key items include colonnades, pocket doors, and a large front door. Back at the shop, Mike works on building a tailgater grill unit for a customer.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Clapp Farm Windmill
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage an Aeromotor windmill in Liberty, North Carolina. They also pick through various barns on the property. Back in the woodshop, Mike uses salvaged barn wood and iron to build a floor lamp.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Weatherford Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs crew saves parts of a farmhouse in South Boston, VA. Key items include chairs, milk-painted paneling, and an arched window.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peanut Silo Salvage
programme.desc: The crew score some doors from the Virginia Military Institute before hesitantly taking on a Peanut Silo Salvage in Virginia. After a precarious roof removal they devise a plan to dismantle the silos while keeping them intact.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Meek Farmhouse
programme.desc: Mike and Robert remove a two-piece staircase from a farmhouse in Marion, VA. The guys also pick through a train yard. Back at the shop, Mike builds a bar from panel doors as a surprise for a customer's husband.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Apple Barn
programme.desc: The team heads to Winchester, VA, to salvage an abandoned orchard barn but they must pick through years of trash and treasures before they begin.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Apple Orchard into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew head into the mountains to salvage different structures of an old apple orchard. Key finds include roof tin, apple picking ladders, and apple crates. Robert also helps Ted build a commissioned iron gate.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Parkville Farmhouse
programme.desc: The team heads to Parkville, MD, to salvage a classic farmhouse. They remove steel from the front porch, doors, and windows from the outside while inside they work to remove radiators, banisters and wainscotting.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Taylor Family Farm
programme.desc: Picking through old farm land and former Native American settlement, the crew find several treasures to load up and take back to Roanoke. Mike and Tay build a freight cart couch in the shop and Robert gets excited about a corn sheller.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Savannah, GA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels down to Georgia to taste some the Savannah's best fried chicken, low country seafood boil and a four-pound pulled pork sandwich known only as the Pigzilla.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Orange County, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb cruises into Orange County, California, to take down a three-pound burger slathered in a sauce made from three of the spiciest peppers on the planet.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins
programme.desc: Casey's multi-year campaign against cuisine has resulted in numerous W's and now find out which was the most epic.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Return of the Mac
programme.desc: Noah Cappe digs in to seven ooey-gooey versions of the classic American casserole. Whether it's stacked in a sandwich, layered in a hot dog, rolled into a taco or topped with lobster, these mac and cheese creations are crave-worthy carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheese Please!
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is back for seconds of his seven favourite melty, ooey-gooey carnival treats. From the savoury truffled grilled cheese at the St. Paul Winter Carnival.

programme.desc: Chefs and food experts share their picks for a Thanksgiving to remember. Anne Burrell devours a turkey leg sandwich at Henry Public in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: The Dish On Charlotte
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood get their southern food tour rolling in a growing city with an emerging food scene rooted in tradition: Charlotte, North Carolina! Their first stop is at Brooks' Sandwich House.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Smokey Mountain Majesty
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood continue their tour in Knoxville, Tennessee, a city that insists on using only the freshest regional ingredients for its spectacular Southern cuisine.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Beach-y Keen Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby uses the brightest and boldest flavors in his Jerk Pork Belly & Sweet Potato Hash with Fried Eggs and makes Coconut Waffles with Chocolate Maple Syrup & Bananas.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Flavors of New England
programme.desc: Bobby takes a culinary trip to New England for his latest brunch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Best of the Pacific Northwest
programme.desc: A Pacific Northwest menu features smoked salmon and scallion scramble.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bold Southwestern Brunch

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits an old San Antonio institution given new life by their phenomenal bacon and blue cheese burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Fix Four Ways
programme.desc: Michael begins his meat-seeking journey in Lockhart, Texas, where one family remains at the forefront of America's greatest barbecue after four generations. Next, he swings over to a British-style joint in Brooklyn where they use lobster meat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat and Mandarins
programme.desc: Noah gets hot for the smokin' okra burger at the Eastern Carolina Agricultural Fair in Florence, SC. Then he launches into atomic habanero tots and 'The Big Yum' at the Mountain Mandarin Festival in Auburn, CA.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Royals and the Red River City
programme.desc: Noah begins his journey at the Royal Winter Fair in Toronto, Canada, where he says "yes, cheese" to the blue balsamic. Later, he ends his culinary adventure at the State Fair of Louisiana with the sweet Not Yo' Average Nachos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Lights and Literature

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Circumstances

programme.title: Dateline: A Crack in Everything

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Galaxie Quest

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Flippin' the Bird

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Calling All Bears
programme.desc: Spring has sprung and there's no shortage of needs on the homestead. Atz Sr. bow-hunts to restock dwindling food supplies. Otto, Charlotte and August scramble to protect livestock at the head of the bay. Atz Lee develops a new foothold in the wilderness.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Mobility, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: As the Kilcher family braces for summer on the homestead, Atz Lee treks to forbidding Perl Island for an emergency crash course in wilderness survival. Jane fights with creatures from the deep for food, and Otto and Eivin attempt a homestead sauna build.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: One Small Flush for Man
programme.desc: As spring draws to a close, Otto and August dig into a monumental plumbing project, and Eivin attempts to help but loses control of his truck. Atz Sr. searches for two predators threatening the Kilcher property. Atz Lee and Jane help Shane with his cabin.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Lost Episode
programme.desc: A never-before-seen lost episode travels back to before Atz Lee's near-fatal accident, as he planned a surprise ceremony to renew his vows with Jane at the head of the bay. Other Kilchers struggle while preparing for the big event.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Olden Days, Olden Ways
programme.desc: The Kilchers pay tribute to the family's patriarch and matriarch, Yule and Ruth, by preparing a feast using strictly old-fashioned methods.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: No Rain, Big Pain
programme.desc: A hot summer threatens the Kilcher cattle. Atz Lee joins forces with a remote homesteading master to learn how to tame the frontier while Jane comes face to face with a bear. Meanwhile, Shane and Kelli make progress on their cabin.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Fall
programme.desc: After a feverish summer of work, the Kilchers prepare for winter. Eivin scales treacherous peaks to fill his freezer. Otto helps with Shane's cabin build, while it takes a perilous turn. For Atz Lee, one fateful step leads to catastrophe.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Recovery Road
programme.desc: As fall comes to a close, Atz Lee confronts the reality of recovering from his accident. To feed their families, Eivin and Jane venture miles at sea in search of massive halibut. The rush to complete the fall harvest puts Eve and Otto in harm's way.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: New Beginnings
programme.desc: The homestead is brewing with new beginnings. Sparks fly between Otto and Charlotte as they build a staircase to prepare for the winter. Atz Lee crosses a critical bridge on his road to recovery.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Do or Die
programme.desc: The Kilchers find themselves unprepared for winter's arrival. Led by Otto and Charlotte, the family's cattle trek a cold and deadly path. Shane risks losing a year's progress on his unfinished cabin, while the family embarks in two massive hunts.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Last Straw
programme.desc: Otto receives a terrifying house call, and the prognosis is grim. Atz Lee's return to the Hunter's Cabin is rudely interrupted, and he turns to a veteran homesteader for help. The Kilchers join forces to protect Shane's cabin from winter's fury.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Whole New Frontier
programme.desc: As spring approaches, the Kilchers prepare for a potentially devastating wildfire season. But when COVID-19 threatens the homestead and crews are evacuated, the family must come together and adapt like never before.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Operation: Intimidation
programme.desc: Brandi is ready to close the Long Beach store, but Jarrod is determined to save it by scoring more lockers. Ivy tries to intimidate other buyers, while Darrell gets the shock treatment.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Return of the King of Montebello
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi split up, and only time will tell if it's for good. Ivy has hired a new employee to run his shop. Darrell's Montebello magic strikes again, and Rene learns the art of stripping.

programme.title: Storage Wars: For a Good Time Call Ivy
programme.desc: Darrell is up to his old tricks again, but it's Ivy who ends up pranking the competition while Rene and Casey space out.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
